ref_fasta_index.title: Reference Genome Index (.fai)
ref_fasta_index.description: Index file for the reference FASTA

ref_dict.title: Reference Genome Dictionary (.dict)
ref_dict.description: Sequence dictionary for the reference FASTA

ref_name.title: Reference Genome Build
ref_name.description: Reference build name used for Annovar (hg38 or hg19)

dbsnp_vcf.title: dbSNP Variants (VCF)
dbsnp_vcf.description: dbSNP VCF file for BQSR and variant annotation

af_only_gnomad.title: gnomAD Allele Frequencies (VCF)
af_only_gnomad.description: gnomAD allele frequency VCF file for Mutect2

known_indels_sites_vcfs.title: Known Indels (VCF)
known_indels_sites_vcfs.description: VCF file(s) with known indel sites for BQSR

wig_gc.title: GC Content (.wig)
wig_gc.description: GC content WIG file for ichorCNA

wig_map.title: Mappability Score (.wig)
wig_map.description: Mappability score WIG file for ichorCNA

panel_of_norm_rds.title: Panel of Normals (.rds)
panel_of_norm_rds.description: RDS file of median corrected depth from panel of normals for ichorCNA

centromeres.title: Centromere Locations (.txt)
centromeres.description: Text file containing centromere locations for ichorCNA

ichorcna_chromosomes.title: ichorCNA Chromosomes
ichorcna_chromosomes.description: Array of chromosomes for ichorCNA read counting. Default: All chromosomes.

ichorcna_chrs_string.title: ichorCNA Chromosomes (R vector)
ichorcna_chrs_string.description: R vector style string of chromosomes for ichorCNA analysis

annovar_protocols.title: Annovar Protocols
annovar_protocols.description: Comma-separated list of Annovar protocols to use (e.g., refGene)

annovar_operation.title: Annovar Operations
annovar_operation.description: Comma-separated list of Annovar operations corresponding to the protocols (e.g., g)

scatter_count.title: Scatter Count
scatter_count.description: Number of intervals to scatter across for parallel processing

high_intensity_cpus.title: High-Intensity CPUs
high_intensity_cpus.description: Number of cores to use for high-intensity tasks (alignment, variant calling, etc.)

high_intensity_memory_gb.title: High-Intensity Memory (GB)
high_intensity_memory_gb.description: Amount of memory to use for high-intensity tasks (alignment, variant calling, etc.)

standard_cpus.title: Standard CPUs
standard_cpus.description: Number of cores to use for standard-intensity tasks (annotation, indexing, etc.)

standard_memory_gb.title: Standard Memory (GB)
standard_memory_gb.description: Amount of memory to use for standard-intensity tasks (annotation, indexing, etc.)

workflow_failure_mode.title: Workflow Failure Mode
workflow_failure_mode.description: Behavior when individual tasks encounter failures
